title: PrivateShulkers
description: Shulker Plugin for locking/private player himself.
body:
**This plugin is essentially designed for use in the shulkerroom world on BoxPvP servers. When a shulker is placed in the world specified in the config.yml, the plugin automatically protects it. The protected shulkers cannot be exploded, opened by others (except for players with ps.admin and ps.bypass permissions), or broken. The placed shulkers are recorded in the data.yml file within the plugin folder.**

## Permissions:
**ps.admin**: The basic admin permission. It is used to execute commands like reloading the plugin and can open all shulkers.

**ps.bypass**: Can only open all shulkers.

## Commands:
**/ps reload**: Refreshes the config file.

**/ps help**: Provides information about the commands in the plugin.

## Info:

**Discord**: https://discord.gg/Hx9GZ8ek2z

Please report any issues with the plugin by opening a ticket on our discord server.
